signed._comment: TUF metadata signing axis: this targets.json is signed by 'offline_ceremony' (Ed25519) only. The 'fulcio_oidc' axis listed in 1.root.json with threshold=2 signs the actual binary blobs out-of-band via cosign in .github/workflows/sign-installer.yml. The verifier therefore requires BOTH (a) a valid TUF metadata chain signed by 'offline_ceremony' AND (b) a Sigstore signature on each artifact verifiable under the 'fulcio_oidc' identity regex. See install/TRUST_ROOT.md §3 and install/tuf/SIGNING.md.
